iteration_1.notes: Baseline. docx-create lost 10 points on 'content' criterion (0.5/1.0) — text extraction likely missed paragraph content

iteration_2.notes: Model fluke — deepseek-v3.2 read docx-js.md but stopped without executing code (106 output tokens). Not caused by skill change.

iteration_3.notes: All criteria at 1.0. Text extraction fix confirmed effective.

changes_made: Rewrote 'Text extraction' section in SKILL.md: replaced pandoc-only guidance with python-docx script that iterates BOTH doc.paragraphs AND doc.tables, with CRITICAL warning that doc.paragraphs excludes table text
Added step 4 to 'Creating a new Word document' workflow: explicit pointer to use python-docx for text extraction after document creation
Added pandoc plain-text alternative with -t plain flag
